title: Patriotic Art Competition
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Patriotic Art Competition''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] competition arranged by the Arts Division of [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]].

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] the competition was won by an artist with a painting entitled "''[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Lord Vader]]: Protector of the Empire's Youth''". He received an all-expense-paid vacation to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
